titleStmt.title: SII 9.141: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 141. (A.R. No. 118 of 1913.) ON A SLAB SET UP INSIDE THE MUKTESVARA TEMPLE AT NILAGUNDA, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 4, Kāḷayukti, Māgha, śu. 5, Ādivāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, Vyatīpāta. The date is not regular. In Kālayukti, Māgha śu. 5 fell on a Thursday nor was it the day of Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti. If, however, śu. 5 is a mistake for śu. 15, the date would correspond to A.D. 1079 January 20 Sunday. This also was not the day of Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti. The inscription refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramaditya VI). It records that, while his feudatory Tribhuvanamalla-Rāyapāṇḍyadēva was ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand and Kaṇiyakallu three-hundred from the nelvīḍu of Uḷuva, the Brāhman Mahājanas of Nīrgunda made a grant of land for the service of Mūlasthāna-Svayambhu-Rāmēśvara of Haḷeyahāḷu. The five-hundred merchants of the place made a gift of a kāṇi per load of betle leaves.

It also records that in the Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 61 Naḷa, Māgh, śu. 10, Sōmavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, Vyatīpāta corresponding to A.D. 1136 January 3 Sunday (not Monday), the Tōṭigas, Konekāṟas, Telligas and others made money contributions at the rate of a pāga per uḷi and per ladder and a soṭige of oil per oil-mill for the service of the god.

In the cycilc year Jaya, Pushya, śu. 14, Sōmavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti corresponding probably to A.D. 1174 December 9 Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti falling on the 25th of the same month, the Mahājanas and others made a grant of land for the same purpose.
The last two gifts are evidently later additions.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
samastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ
paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēva
ra vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhipriddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salluttamire
tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpu
ravarādhīśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamā
rtaṇḍa paricchēdigaṇḍa rājigacōḷamanōbhaṁgaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhriṁgaṁ śrīmattri
bhuvanamallarāyapāṁḍyadēvaru nūḷaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsiramumaṁ kaṇiyakallu mūnnūṟumaṁ
duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁdāḷuttuḻuvina nalevīḍinalu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁge
yyuttamire . tripadi . nāḍugaḷoḷagella gāḍivetta samadanāḍagaḷarasanati(nati) celva kōgaḷi
nāḍu nōḍalke sogayikkuṁ . Ānāḍoḷesevudu nānāvidvajjanasthānaṁ nīrgguṁdavenipa
grahāravatyānandakāri jagakellaṁ . Āmahāgrāmada mahājanaṁgaḷu yamaniyama
svādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunāmeṣṭhāṇajapamādhiśīḷaguṇasaṁpannaruṁ sujanaprasannaruṁ
catuḥsamudramēkhaḷāvanītaḷaprakhyātaruṁ Ēkavākyaruṁ dvijavaṁśāvataṁsaruṁ trikāṇḍa
mīmāṁsāsarōvararājahaṁsaruṁ caturvvēdavēdāṁgōpāṁgāṣṭādaśasmritipurāṇānēka
śāstrasāhityapārāvārapāraṁgataruṁ paṁcamahāyajñakriyānirataruṁ ṣa
ṭkarmmapararuṁ saptasōmasaṁsthāvabhritāvagāhanapavitrīkritaśarīrarumaṣṭāṁga
yōgaprayōgaruṁ navasūtravirājamānaviśāḷōraskaruṁ daśadiśādhavaḷita
mahāyaśaskaruṁ caturddaśavidyāpāragaruṁ dvātrimśatusahasrasamayāgragaṇya
ru(ṁ)manavaratasamupārjjitapuṇyaruṁ nāmādipraśastasahitaṁ śrīmanma
hāgrahāraṁ nīrgguṁdadaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷu mūnūrbbaru . svasti śrīmaccā
ḷukyavikramavarṣa 4 neya kālayuktisaṁvatsarada māgha śu 5 Ādivāra vutta
rāyaṇasaṁkrānti vyatīpātada(ṁ)ndu Ūriṁ baḍagaṇa deseya haḷeyahāḷa mū
lasthānada śrīsvayaṁbhurāmēśvaradēvargge Aṁgabhōga Upahārādiga
ḷgendu biṭṭa tōṭada sthaḷaṁ śrībhīmeśvaradēvara tōṭada baḍagaṇa deseyalli
kamma 200 rāmēśvaradēvara dēguladiṁ haḍuvaṇa desayaluṁ teṁkadeseya
luvāgi hūvina tōṭaṁ kamma 200 dēguladiṁ mūḍaṇa deseyalli hiri
ya bāykāla baḍagaṇa taḍiviḍidu beddale kamma 500 Ī dharmmavappudu salutta
mire taḷada baṇaṁjigaruṁ nānādēśigaḷuvirddu dēvargge nivēdyakke biṭṭa dharmmavappudu davasa(ṁ)kke
hoṁge bānaṁ vondu samasta baṇaṁjigaraynūrbbaruvirddu biṭṭa dharmmavappudu Āvupannadaḍakeya
hēṟondakke kāṇiyondu . svasti śrīmaccāḷukya vikramavarṣa 61 neya naḷasaṁvatsa
rada māghaśu 10 sōmavāra vuttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti vyatīpātada(ṁ)ndu samastatō
ṭigaruṁ konekāṟaruṁ vuḷiya mūnūrbbarumirddu dēvargge nivēdyakkaṁ nandādīvigegabi
ṭṭa dharmavappudu Uḷige pāga samastakoylūḷigaḷellaru mettakāṟaru dēvargge nandādīvigege biṭṭa dha
rma Ēṇige pāga telligarayvattokkalu dēvargge nandādīvigege biṭṭa dharmmaṁ gāṇadalu
sūṭige yeṇne Intī dharmmava pratipāḷisidargge vāraṇāśiyalu sāsira kavileyaṁ
sāsirbbaru vēdapāragarige sūryyagrahaṇadalu dānaṁmāḍida phalavidakka
pāyamāḍidarggā brāhmaṇarumanā kavileymanaḷida pāpa . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō
haranti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . kanda . rāmēśvara pādadvaya
tāmarasabhramaranakhiḷaśivabhaktara tottī mahiyoḷesadanalte dharāmarakuḷasaṁbhavōttamaṁ śrī
gareya . Ātaṁ tānī dēvanikētanamaṁ bhaktiyinda māḍisi negarddā bhūtaḷabāḷella janamuṁ prī
tiye pogaḷalke kūrttu manadolavinda . dēvargge nityapūjege hūvina tōṭamunaḍakkedōṭagaḷu
bāviya māḍisidanadēviriyanō ciddaṇaṁ mahītaḷadoḷage . jayasaṁvatsarada puṣya
śuddha 14 sōmavāra Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti vyatīpāta kūḍida mahātithiyaṁdu dēvaraṁga
bhōga Upahārakkeṁdu Ādanūra taḷavukāra Iruḷunīkkiyāṁḍaru biṭṭa tōṭasthaḷa kabba
lagaṭṭada keḷage śīruḷaṁgovopparaḍḍakada taletarada mūḍaṇa kaḍe kaṁma 200 Āṁdu A
śēṣamahājanaṁgaḷu biṭṭa dharmma śrībhīmēśvaradēvara kabbilagaṭṭatōṁṭṭadiṁ paḍuva
lu tōṁṭṭasthaḷa kaṁma 500 Aṁdu Okkalamakkaḷuṁ Uḷiyamū
nūrvvaruṁ kuṁbāṟagaṭṭada keḷage biṭṭa tōṁṭa kamma 130 .
Digital edition of SII 9.141 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
